ambiguous_fraud.context: New vendor, no GSTIN, round amount Rs 5L, first transaction ever
ambiguous_fraud.demo_talking_point: Our agent doesn't assume fraud OR legitimacy. It escalates with both interpretations and lets the CFO decide with full evidence.

transaction.narration: Import of goods under Special Economic Zone notification
transaction.note: SEZ import — complex zero-rated supply rules

unknown_regulation.context: SEZ import with zero-rated supply, complex regulatory area
unknown_regulation.expected_outcome: ESCALATED — SEZ-specific zero-rated supply rules outside standard knowledge
unknown_regulation.demo_talking_point: The agent knows what it doesn't know. It identifies this as a complex SEZ transaction and escalates rather than guessing.

transaction.narration: Advance payment for supply of pharmaceutical products
transaction.note: IndAS 115 says no revenue recognition on advance — but GST Section 12 says GST applies on advance received

conflicting_rules.outcome: Do NOT recognise revenue — performance obligation not met
conflicting_rules.implication: Revenue stays on balance sheet until delivery

conflicting_rules.outcome: GST IS applicable on advance received
conflicting_rules.implication: 18% GST due on Rs 25L advance = Rs 4.5L immediate liability

rule_conflict.expected_outcome: CONFLICT DETECTED — GST and IndAS 115 conflict on advance payment treatment
rule_conflict.demo_talking_point: Two regulations conflict on the same transaction. The agent surfaces both interpretations, explains the conflict, and refuses to act unilaterally.

out_of_scope.query: Can you help me with ICD-10 medical coding for a patient discharge?
out_of_scope.expected_outcome: GRACEFUL DECLINE — outside financial close domain
out_of_scope.demo_talking_point: The agent knows its boundaries. It declines clearly, explains what it can do, and doesn't hallucinate an answer.

transaction.note: Looks like timing difference but amount is Rs 4,501,000 not Rs 4,500,000 — Rs 1,000 discrepancy

auto_clear_trap.context: Recurring vendor with known payment pattern, but Rs 1000 mismatch
auto_clear_trap.expected_outcome: ESCALATED — timing difference pattern detected but amount mismatch prevents auto-clear
auto_clear_trap.demo_talking_point: The auto-clear logic doesn't just check dates — it validates amounts too. This Rs 1,000 discrepancy on a Rs 45L invoice prevents auto-clear and triggers review.
